title: Dedalus Orchestrator Coaching Report Generation
code:
graph TD
    %% Nodes
    User([User / Player])
    Query[Targeted Query]
    Orchestrator{{Dedalus Orchestrator}}

    %% Agents
    Bio[Biomechanics Agent]
    Tac[Tactical Agent]
    Men[Mental Agent]

    %% Snowflake Tools
    MCP[Snowflake MCP Tool]
    History[(Player History DB)]

    %% Output
    Synthesis[Insight Synthesis]
    Report[Coaching Report]

    %% Connections
    User --> Query
    Query --> Orchestrator

    Orchestrator -->|Delegates| Bio
    Orchestrator -->|Delegates| Tac
    Orchestrator -->|Delegates| Men

    Bio -->|Returns Analysis| Orchestrator
    Tac -->|Returns Analysis| Orchestrator
    Men -->|Returns Analysis| Orchestrator

    Orchestrator -.->|Tool Call| MCP
    MCP <-->|SQL & Vector Search| History
    MCP -.->|Returns Context| Orchestrator

    Orchestrator --> Synthesis
    Synthesis --> Report
    Report --> User

ai.summary: Illustrates how the Dedalus Orchestrator processes user queries, delegates to specialized agents, leverages Snowflake for historical data, and synthesizes
ai.whatItShows: This diagram depicts the workflow of the Dedalus Orchestrator system. A user initiates a query, which the Orchestrator receives. It then delegates analysis to specialized agents (Biomechanics, Tactical, Mental) and concurrently queries the Snowflake MCP Tool for historical player data. After receiving analysis from agents and context from Snowflake, the Orchestrator performs insight synthesis to generate a comprehensive coaching report for the user.
ai.whenToUse: Use this diagram to illustrate multi-agent orchestration systems, complex data processing workflows, systems involving specialized analytical components, or report generation pipelines that integrate various data sources and analysis steps. It's ideal for showing how different modules collaborate to achieve a specific outcome.
ai.howToAdapt: This diagram can be adapted by adding more specialized agents for different domains, integrating additional data sources or external APIs, incorporating decision points or feedback loops within the orchestration, or detailing the specific technologies used within each agent or the Snowflake MCP Tool. The report output could also be expanded to include different formats or delivery mechanisms.
